rules.rule_text:
rule Hangover_Smackdown_various
{
	meta:
		author = "Alienvault Labs"
		reference = "https://www.alienvault.com/blogs/labs-research/microsoft-office-zeroday-used-to-attack-pakistani-targets"

	strings:
		$a1 = "pranVacrhan"
		$a2 = "NaramGaram"
		$a3 = "vampro"
		$a4 = "AngelPro"
		$b1 = "VBA6.DLL"
		$b2 = "advpack"
		$b3 = "IsNTAdmin"

	condition:
		1 of ( $a* ) and all of ( $b* )
}
